feedback: Payment failed twice while renewing my premium plan and I was charged once. This needs attention.
The payment gateway keeps showing an error. Please fix this quickly. Overall, please improve this.
I requested a refund but the refund status is unclear.
Customer support has not responded to my ticket for three days. I hope this is resolved soon.
Support gave me the same generic reply and did not solve my issue.
Most leads are irrelevant and not interested in buying. Thanks.
I am receiving spam leads and fake buyer enquiries.
The leads do not match the product category I selected.
KYC verification is confusing and I cannot complete onboarding. This needs attention.
I could not sign up because verification keeps failing. Overall, please improve this.
The app crashes every time I try to edit my product profile.
Login is not working after the latest update. I hope this is resolved soon.
Search results are not relevant and filters are difficult to use.
My listings have poor visibility in search despite complete details. Thanks.
Delivery was delayed and I did not receive a clear shipment update.
The order was delivered late and returning it was difficult.
The premium plan is expensive for the quality of leads I receive. This needs attention.
Pricing is okay but the subscription benefits are not clear. Overall, please improve this.
The onboarding was mostly smooth and profile setup was easy.
Very easy to find reliable suppliers and compare options. I hope this is resolved soon.
The new dashboard is useful and I can manage enquiries faster.
Search is fast and I found the supplier I needed quickly. Thanks.
Support responded fast and helped me update my account.
Payment was smooth and the invoice was available immediately.
The app is useful but loading is slow during busy hours. This needs attention.
The filters are helpful but there should be more options. Overall, please improve this.
I need clearer information about renewal before the plan expires.
My account details were updated but it took a few attempts. I hope this is resolved soon.
I received a few good leads this week, much better than before.
Delivery tracking worked well and I got regular updates. Thanks.
